name: PM Awas Yojana (Urban)
benefit: Ghar banane ke liye Rs 2.5 lakh ki madad

name: Ayushman Bharat PMJAY
benefit: 5 lakh rupaye tak ka free ilaaj

name: e-Shram Card
benefit: 2 lakh ka accident insurance + welfare schemes

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
benefit: Free LPG connection + pehli refill free
documents: Aadhaar, BPL ration card, bank account

name: PM Mudra Yojana
benefit: 50,000 se 10 lakh tak ka business loan bina guarantee ke
documents: Aadhaar, PAN, bank account, business proof

name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
benefit: 2 lakh ka life insurance sirf Rs 436/saal mein

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
benefit: 2 lakh ka accident insurance sirf Rs 20/saal mein

name: Atal Pension Yojana
benefit: 60 saal ke baad Rs 1000-5000 monthly pension guaranteed

name: OBC Post-Matric Scholarship
benefit: Tuition fees + monthly stipend for higher education
documents: Aadhaar, caste certificate, income certificate, marksheet

name: SC/ST Scholarship
benefit: Monthly stipend + books aur uniform ke liye grant
documents: Aadhaar, caste certificate, income certificate, school proof

name: MGNREGA (Job Card)
benefit: Saal mein 100 din ka guaranteed rozgar minimum wage par
documents: Aadhaar, gram panchayat job card, bank account

name: PM SVANidhi (Rehri Wala Loan)
benefit: Rs 10,000 ka loan bina guarantee ke street vendors ke liye
documents: Aadhaar, vending certificate ya recommendation letter
